School of Electrical Engineering

Apply to join Global College today >

Explore courses at the Global Technical College>

Explore events at the Global Technical College >

Looking to jumpstart your career in the electrical field? At Global Technical College, we offer practical and accredited electrical engineering courses in Kenya that prepare you for real-world opportunities.
 Whether you’re starting as a beginner, aiming for a diploma, or upgrading with short courses, we’ve got you covered.

 

Why Choose Our Electrical Engineering Courses?

  • Accredited Programs (NITA & KNEC recognized)
  • Hands-on Practical Training with modern tools and labs
  • Flexible Study Options – full-time, part-time, and short courses
  • Affordable Fees with payment plans available
  • Career-Ready Skills that open opportunities in Kenya and beyond

 

Programmes & Tuition Fees

Artisan in Electrical Installations (NITA)

  • Electrical Technicians
  • Wiremen & Installers
  • Solar & Renewable Energy Specialists
  • CCTV & Security Systems Technicians
  • Electronics Repair Experts
  • Power & Maintenance Engineers

 

Why Study Electrical Engineering in Kenya with Us?

Kenya’s growing demand for skilled electrical professionals means opportunity is everywhere — from construction and manufacturing to renewable energy. At Global Technical College, we don’t just train you for exams; we train you for real careers.

 

Admission Requirements

  • Copy of National ID or Passport
  • Academic Transcripts / Certificates
  • Admission Fee: KES 2,000

 

Eastleigh, 2nd Avenue, Section 1 Eastleigh, Nairobi – Kenya

+254799925625 info@globalcollege.ac.ke

Mon – Fri 9:00A.M. – 5:00P.M.

Apply now

How to Apply

Start your journey at Global College in 3 simple steps.

01

Choose Your Program

Explore our courses and select the program that matches your career goals.

02

Submit Your Application

Complete the application form with your personal and academic details.

03

Start Your Learning Journey

Once approved, enroll and begin building the skills for your future career.

At Global Technical College, we believe in the power of practical education to transform lives. Since our founding, we’ve helped thousands of students gain real-world skills.

Ronald

Principal

  • Duration: 2 years (6 terms)
  • Tuition: KES 21,000 per term
  • Perfect for beginners starting a career in electrical installations.

 

Electrical Wireman (Grade III, II, I)

  • Duration: 6 months per grade
  • Tuition: KES 21,000 per term
  • Gain professional certification and advance through the grades.
  •  

Diploma in Electrical & Electronics Engineering (Power Option)

  • Duration: 18 months (6 terms)
  • Tuition: KES 21,000 per term
  • Advanced program for those seeking to become electrical engineers with broader career prospects.

 

Short Courses in Electrical & Electronics

  1. Basic Electrical Installation – 3 months – KES 21,000
  2. Solar & Electrical Installations – 3 months – KES 21,000
  3. CCTV & Alarm System Installations – 3 months – KES 21,000
  4. Electronics Repair – 3 months – KES 21,000

These short courses are ideal for upskilling or gaining quick, job-ready certifications.

 

Career Opportunities

Graduates of our electrical engineering courses in Kenya go on to work as:

  • Electrical Technicians
  • Wiremen & Installers
  • Solar & Renewable Energy Specialists
  • CCTV & Security Systems Technicians
  • Electronics Repair Experts
  • Power & Maintenance Engineers

 

Why Study Electrical Engineering in Kenya with Us?

Kenya’s growing demand for skilled electrical professionals means opportunity is everywhere — from construction and manufacturing to renewable energy. At Global Technical College, we don’t just train you for exams; we train you for real careers.

 

Admission Requirements

  • Copy of National ID or Passport
  • Academic Transcripts / Certificates
  • Admission Fee: KES 2,000
